summary: I'm adding return_positions=False kwarg to Encoding.encode (after disallowed_special) plus new logic before the return statement inside the try block; will keep the diff minimal/localized to reduce overlap - can you confirm where your transformers param goes (signature position and whether it changes text before the existing try/except block) so our diffs don't clobber each other?
